items.briefing:
Australian businesses are rapidly adopting AI tools, but security experts warn that many organisations are moving faster than their risk management practices can keep up with. This is particularly relevant for training organisations handling sensitive student data. Separately, Microsoft has patched a zero-day vulnerability known as RoguePlanet — if your organisation uses Microsoft products, ensure devices and software are updated as soon as possible.

**Practical tip:** Check that automatic updates are enabled on all work devices so critical security patches like the Microsoft fix are applied without delay.

featured.title: ACSC warns of large-scale campaign exploiting CMS vulnerabilities in Australia
featured.quote: Australian businesses face coordinated CMS vulnerability attacks, per official government warning.
